name: chr7_centromere
description: Chromosome 7 centromere/pericentromere (acen band interval). Alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array: D7Z1 / D7Z2 (~6-monomer HOR); SF4. Flanked by pericentric HSat2/HSat3 satellite blocks. GRCh38 represents this region only as a placeholder gap interval filled with model alpha-satellite; fully sequence-resolved only in T2T-CHM13.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers organised into HOR units (~1-6 kb each), tandemly arrayed
